items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 13: To buy / To sell. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• I buy I sell
• I want to buy a house I want to sell my bicycle
• I want to buy a new house I need to sell my stor e
• I want to buy a car I want to sell my house

items.text: I want to buy a house I want to sell my bicycle

items.prompt: I quero comprar uma casa Eu quero vender minha b icicleta
options: I want to buy a house I want to sell my bicycle 3.
bicycle my sell to want I house a buy to want I
You want to buy a house I want to sell my bicycle
I want to buy a house I want to sell my bicycle

items.text: I want to buy a new house I need to sell my stor e

items.prompt: Eu quero comprar uma casa nova Eu preciso vender minha loja
options: I want to buy a new house I need to sell my stor e 3.
You want to buy a new house I need to sell my stor e
I want to buy a new house I need to sell my stor e
e stor my sell to need I house new a buy to want I

items.answer: I want to buy a car I want to sell my house
I want to buy a new car I need to sell my car
